# CWE-488: global map shares cart state across unrelated sessions.
lang: go
file: CWE-488-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var sessionCarts = map[string][]string{}

func ViewCart(c *gin.Context) {
	sid := c.Query("session")
	items := sessionCarts[sid]
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"items": items})
}

func AddCartItem(c *gin.Context) {
	sid := c.Query("session")
	sessionCarts[sid] = append(sessionCarts[sid], c.PostForm("sku"))
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
